comment: Cross-runtime contract for @UVCHOICES hidden-set computation. Each case gives the field's full code list (all) and an authored show OR hide list; 'hidden' is the exact set of codes the filter must hide, in order. tests/hook_php.php drives these through the real server audit (a value is flagged iff hidden); tests/choices_dom_js.cjs drives them through the real client factory (a choice element is hidden iff hidden). Both runtimes must agree with this file.

cases.name: show a subset hides the complement, in all-list order
hide one code hides exactly it
complement preserves the all-list order, not the show order
